S.FORM: Mel Bennett kawas tay 1955, ryax sa tay 4 nqu tay 1, Mel Bennett, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: mel ОІennett kawas~Й• taj ****, rjax s~Й•a taj * nqu taj *, mel ОІennett, s~Й•quliq na pК”unro. КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oКҰ~КЁiation plajers~Й•
